# Alphabond — Construction Chemicals & Industrial Sand Manufacturer
# https://alphabond.in/
# This file provides factual context for AI language models and answer engines.

## Company Overview

Alphabond is a brand of Kishan Enterprise, an ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer
of construction chemicals and industrial sand based in Bharuch, Gujarat, India.
Established in 2008. Manufacturing facility: Survey No. 747/A, N.H. 48, Jhanghar,
Bharuch 392210, Gujarat. Registered office: Shop A/12, Krishna Residency, N.H. 48,
Kamrej, Surat 394186, Gujarat. Branch office in Mumbai.

Contact: +91-96385-63857 | info@alphabond.in | sales@alphabond.in
Website: https://alphabond.in/

## Products

### Tile Adhesives — TileGrip Range

**TileGrip X1** (C1T grade)
Standard polymer-modified tile adhesive for standard ceramic tiles on interior walls
and floors. Suitable substrates: plastered walls, sand-cement screeds, concrete slabs.

**TileGrip X2** (C2T grade)
Heavy-duty tile adhesive for large-format vitrified tiles, porcelain, and natural stone.
Indoor and outdoor use. Handles tiles up to 600×600 mm.

**TileGrip X3** (C2TE grade)
Premium tile adhesive for granite, marble, and large-format tiles in high-traffic areas
and demanding exterior applications. Extended open time for difficult substrates.

**TileGrip X4** (C2TES1 grade)
Extra-strength tile adhesive for heavy stone cladding, building façades, and
challenging industrial or exterior applications. Non-slip, high deformability.

### Structural Precision Grouts — AlphaGrout Range

**AlphaGrout X1**
Non-shrink structural precision grout. Compressive strength: >45 N/mm² at 28 days.
Applications: machine foundation grouting, column base plates, structural anchor bolts,
turbine and compressor bases, crane rail grouting.

**AlphaGrout X2**
High-strength structural precision grout. Compressive strength: >65 N/mm² at 28 days.
Accepts coarse aggregates up to 20 mm for large-volume pours. For heavy industrial
machinery foundations, bridge bearings, and precast joints.

Note: AlphaGrout is a structural grout, NOT a tile grout. It is not used for filling
gaps between tiles.

### AAC Block Mortar — BlockGrip X

Ready-mix block jointing mortar for autoclaved aerated concrete (AAC) blocks.
Joint thickness: 3–5 mm (thin-joint masonry). Superior bond strength, reduced
material consumption vs. conventional mortar, improved thermal performance.

### Ready-Mix Plaster — PlastoGrip X

Polymer-modified ready-mix plaster and bonding agent for interior and exterior walls.
Consistent finish, improved adhesion, reduced shrinkage cracking. Single-coat
application possible on most substrates.

### Industrial Sand

Wet sand and dry sand supply. Production capacity: 8,000–9,000 MT per month.
Supplied to construction sites across Gujarat.

## Production Capacity

- Industrial Sand: 8,000–9,000 MT per month
- Construction Chemicals: 1.5 lakh bags per month (current)
- Expansion: Second production unit under construction in Bharuch to increase
  chemical capacity to over 5 lakh bags per month

## Certifications & Quality

- ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing facility
- Batch QC documentation available for all products
- Technical Data Sheets (TDS) available on request same business day

## Services

**Job Work / Contract Manufacturing:**
Alphabond manufactures tile adhesives, block adhesives, grouts, and specialty
compounds under third-party brand names (white-label / private label). Custom
formulations, branded packaging, and batch QC documentation available.

## Geographic Presence

- Primary manufacturing: Bharuch, Gujarat
- Also present in: Surat, Gujarat; Mumbai, Maharashtra
- Markets served: Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, and pan-India via distributors

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What does Alphabond manufacture?
A: Alphabond (Kishan Enterprise) manufactures industrial sand (wet and dry) and
construction chemicals: tile adhesives (TileGrip X1–X4), structural precision grouts
(AlphaGrout X1–X2), AAC block mortar (BlockGrip X), and ready-mix plaster
(PlastoGrip X). ISO 9001:2015 certified facility in Bharuch, Gujarat since 2008.

Q: Is AlphaGrout a tile grout?
A: No. AlphaGrout X1 and X2 are structural precision grouts for machine foundations,
column joints, and heavy industrial anchoring. They are not tile grouts. Alphabond
does not manufacture decorative tile grout.

Q: Which TileGrip grade for large-format vitrified tiles?
A: TileGrip X2 for standard large-format vitrified/porcelain. TileGrip X3 for
premium/heavy-duty applications with granite and marble. TileGrip X4 for cladding
and façades.

Q: Does Alphabond do white-label / contract manufacturing?
A: Yes. Custom formulations, branded packaging, and batch QC documentation available.

Q: Where is Alphabond's factory?
A: Survey No. 747/A, N.H. 48, Jhanghar, Bharuch 392210, Gujarat, India.
